libmpv Windows binary provenance
================================

Distribution: shinchiro/mpv-winbuild-cmake release 20260610
MPV version: v0.41.0-744-g304426c39
MPV revision: 304426c390901436fb1d4a63efbd582ae80c88f4
CPU baseline: x86-64-v3
Archive: mpv-dev-x86_64-v3-20260610-git-304426c.7z
Archive SHA-256: d4b3d6df9fdb33d5591c4ece7d0cc24d2f7822b298f6a1528595e0ccff7424a6
Archive URL: https://github.com/shinchiro/mpv-winbuild-cmake/releases/download/20260610/mpv-dev-x86_64-v3-20260610-git-304426c.7z
Build scripts and dependency revisions: https://github.com/shinchiro/mpv-winbuild-cmake/tree/20260610
MPV source: https://github.com/mpv-player/mpv/commit/304426c390901436fb1d4a63efbd582ae80c88f4

The mpv project lists shinchiro's builds on its Windows installation page:
https://mpv.io/installation/

The upstream GNU-style COFF import archive is stored as lib/mpv.lib so Cargo's
MSVC target can discover it by link name. Its bytes are otherwise unchanged.
